headline.text: No production issues across any plant — L1 Line 2 chiller relocation progressing on schedule for *Tuesday startup*.

per_plant_summary.L1: L1 Line 2 chiller relocation is on track. Electrical hooked up and live, refrigeration finishing by end of Friday, plumbing half-done and completing Saturday, targeting Monday startup for Tuesday production.
per_plant_summary.L2: No activity in the last 24 hours.
per_plant_summary.L3: No activity in the last 24 hours.

notes.text: Line 2 chiller relocation on schedule — electrical complete and energized, refrigeration finishing tonight, plumbing half-done finishing tomorrow, Monday startup planned for Tuesday production.
